title: HGN Create
description: Create based mod collection for the HGN.hu Create server.
body:
# About this modpack
This forge-based modpack builds around the fantastic Create mod and it's addons to provide a fresh tech-based experience from simple mechanical machines to electricity (trough steam- and fuel based machines) without sacrificing too much of the vanilla feel of Minecraft.

We've added Farmer's Delight and a few addons for it to spice up the food production too alongside with some of Macaw's mods and others like Chipped by Terrarium or Rechiseled by SuperMartinj642 and a few more (please check the version dependencies to see all included mods) so you can decorate your factories with a wider array of blocks.

We've also added some fantasy related mods (mainly Origins and Medieval Origins addon and exploration related mods) for players who like to roleplay a little bit but they're completely optional.

Ohh, did I mention that you can build your dream ships and airships too with the Eureka! mod? Or at least you can before you destroy your environment with pollution from your factories :) (added by the mod Pollution of the Realms by EnderLanky)

ps.: this modpack is mainly for our private server but feel free to play with it

## Roadmap
- Add some village-generation related mods (Better Villages by jtl_elisa has a village-frequency bug currently)
- Tweak recipes as needed
- Add a server package

## External mods (from CurseForge):
- [ForgeEndertech](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgeendertech) by EnderLanky
- [Pollution of the Realms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pollution-of-the-realms) by EnderLanky
- [Advanced Chimneys](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-chimneys) by EnderLanky
- [Large Ore Deposits](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/large-ore-deposits) by EnderLanky
- [Inventory Sorter](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-sorter) by cpw
- [Macaw's Bridges](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges) by sketch_macaw
- [Macaw's Doors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors) by sketch_macaw
- [Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls) by sketch_macaw
- [Sophisticated Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-core) by P3pp3rF1y
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks) by P3pp3rF1y 
- [Storage Drawers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-drawers) by Texelsaur
